perturbation.original_text: 1.3. "Distributor" means Siemens, its Affiliates, or any Third Party which has been granted distribution rights whose scope includes the Products and/or Services by Siemens.
perturbation.explanation: The original text defines "Distributor" as Siemens, its Affiliates, or any Third Party granted distribution rights by Siemens. The changed text narrows the definition to ONLY Siemens. This creates a contradiction because later sections might assume "Distributor" includes affiliates or third parties, leading to enforcement uncertainty. For example, Section 3.13 refers to Siemens' Affiliates or distributors purchasing Systems or Services pursuant to the terms of this Agreement, so having only Siemens is an in-text contradiction and makes the entire section invalid.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.13. Affiliates; Distributors. Siemens shall cause any of its Affiliates or distributors purchasing Systems or Services pursuant to the terms of this Agreement to agree to be bound by and comply with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and the provisions of the Strategic Alliance Agreement related to or applicable to such purchase, unless such Affiliate or distributor is already party to a distribution agreement for Products with Accuray.
perturbation.justification: The changed text redefines 'Distributor' to mean only Siemens, whereas the original text included Siemens, its Affiliates, or any Third Party. Section 3.13 explicitly refers to 'Siemens shall cause any of its Affiliates or distributors purchasing Systems or Services pursuant to the terms of this Agreement.' By removing Affiliates and third-party distributors from the definition of 'Distributor,' the changed text directly contradicts Section 3.13, creating a clear in-text contradiction. This invalidates the section that relies on Affiliates and distributors being included.

perturbation.original_text: 2.  DISTRIBUTORSHIP 2.1. Appointment. Accuray hereby appoints Distributor as a non-exclusive, worldwide distributor of Products and Services to Customers solely in connection with Multiple LINAC or Multi-Modality Purchases, not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. By way of clarification, this Agreement does not relate to any Cayman Product, including, without limitation, the distribution or sale thereof or any services related thereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 2.  DISTRIBUTORSHIP 2.1. Appointment. Accuray hereby appoints Distributor as an exclusive, worldwide distributor of Products and Services to Customers solely in connection with Multiple LINAC or Multi-Modality Purchases, not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. By way of clarification, this Agreement does not relate to any Cayman Product, including, without limitation, the distribution or sale thereof or any services related thereto.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies that the distributor is a "non-exclusive" distributor, meaning Accuray can appoint other distributors. The modified text changes this to "exclusive," meaning only Siemens, per the above change, can distribute the products. This contradicts the phrase "not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors." This creates significant uncertainty because it is now not clear whether Accuray can also distribute the products. This contradicts the phrase "not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors."
perturbation.contradicted_text: 2.  DISTRIBUTORSHIP 2.1. Appointment. Accuray hereby appoints Distributor as an exclusive, worldwide distributor of Products and Services to Customers solely in connection with Multiple LINAC or Multi-Modality Purchases, not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors and subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. By way of clarification, this Agreement does not relate to any Cayman Product, including, without limitation, the distribution or sale thereof or any services related thereto.
perturbation.justification: The change from "non-exclusive" to "exclusive" directly contradicts the phrase "not to the exclusion of Accuray itself or any of its other current or future distributors." The original text allows Accuray and others to be distributors, while the changed text suggests only the Distributor can be, creating a direct conflict and uncertainty about distribution rights. This aligns with the definition of Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction where conflicting obligations arise from the use of inconsistent terms.

perturbation.original_text: 2.2.1. Pricing of Products and Services shall be based upon Accuray's then current price lists for such Products and Services. The current price list for Products and Services effective as of the Effective Date will be provided to Distributor contemporaneously with the delivery of this fully executed Agreement to Distributor. Such price lists will be subject to change from time to time in Accuray's sole discretion, and Accuray shall use commercially reasonable efforts to provide Distributor with updated pricing on a regular basis, provided that pricing included in a Quote delivered by Accuray to Distributor shall reflect Accuray's current up-to-date pricing unless otherwise agreed. Updated price lists shall not apply to valid Quotes 2 issued by Accuray and subject to acceptance by Distributor prior to the effective date of such updated price lists.
perturbation.changed_text: 2.2.1. Pricing of Products and Services shall be based upon Accuray's then current price lists for such Products and Services. The current price list for Products and Services effective as of the Effective Date will be provided to Siemens contemporaneously with the delivery of this fully executed Agreement to Siemens. Such price lists will be subject to change from time to time in Accuray's sole discretion, and Accuray shall use commercially reasonable efforts to provide Siemens with updated pricing on a regular basis, provided that pricing included in a Quote delivered by Accuray to Siemens shall reflect Accuray's current up-to-date pricing unless otherwise agreed. Updated price lists shall not apply to valid Quotes 2 issued by Accuray and subject to acceptance by Siemens prior to the effective date of such updated price lists.
perturbation.explanation: Given the change in 1.3 that Distributor is Siemens alone and given the change that Siemens is the ONLY distributor in 2.1 then, in 2.2 where Distributor is being replaced for Siemens, there is no uncertainty, which is what we need. However, this can create an uncertainty where in some parts of the document we refer to Distributor as Siemens and in other sections it is still Distributor and therefore it may or may not be reffering to Siemens as Distributor
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1. Independent Distributor. Distributor shall be and must at all times make it clear that it is an independent entity contracting with Accuray, and is not the employee, representative or agent of Accuray. Distributor does not have the ability or authority to enter into any legal agreements or obligations that would bind Accuray in any manner.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Distributor' as an independent entity. The changed text replaces 'Distributor' with 'Siemens' in section 2.2.1. While the explanation states that the changes in sections 1.3 and 2.1 establish Siemens as the exclusive distributor, the contradictory text in 3.1 still refers to 'Distributor' as an independent entity. Thus, if 'Distributor' and 'Siemens' are used interchangeably without clarification, it creates a contradiction because Siemens is now explicitly named in a section previously referring to 'Distributor' generally, potentially implying that Siemens is also an independent entity which may or may not be the intent, leading to potential legal ramifications as 'Distributor' now may or may not mean Siemens based on different sections of the document.
